item.title: Nasdaq, S&P 500 Futures Decline As US, Israel Launch New Strikes On Iran — MDB, ASTS, CRDO, AAPL On Traders' Radar Today
item.description: Data from Stocktwits showed that retail sentiment on SPY and QQQ turned ‘bearish’.

item.title: Credo CEO Reportedly Says Middle East Holds Long-Term Promise For Data Centers: ‘This Is A Really Resilient Region’
item.description: Speaking to CNBC, Brennan said the surge in data center construction spans continents, underscoring broad-based demand for high-speed connectivity sol...

item.title: Changpeng Zhao Promises ‘Binance-Level Brain’ For AI Agents As 2026 Crypto Wallet Wars Heat Up
item.description: Crypto exchanges like Coinbase, OKX and Bitget are adding new features around AI decision-making directly into non-custodial wallets.

item.title: Iran's Natanz Nuclear Enrichment Facility Sustains Damage, IAEA Confirms
item.description: The nuclear watchdog stated that the entrance buildings of Iran’s underground Natanz Fuel Enrichment Plant have sustained some damage recently.

item.title: EXCLUSIVE: Swiss Sneaker Maker On Stays Bullish On Middle East Expansion Despite Iran Tensions — Says US Tariff Relief Could Boost Margins
item.description: In an interview with Stocktwits, CEO Martin Hoffmann outlined expansion plans, the company’s LightSpray production, and the benefits of full-price sal...
